headline: Swiss OFSP projects 5% health insurance premium hike for 2027
summary: Swiss Federal Office of Public Health forecasts another 5% increase in health insurance premiums for 2027 despite stabilising costs.

headline: Digital surveillance law revision could trigger economic catastrophe for Switzerland, study warns
summary: A Geneva foundation study says the pending revision of Switzerland's telecommunications surveillance legislation would impose massive economic costs on Swiss technology companies.

headline: Vaud Grand Council may open civil proceedings in 'bouclier fiscal' tax-shield affair
summary: A Vaud cantonal parliament commission supports examining a civil action in the controversial tax-shield case.

headline: Swiss Military Academy poll: majority want stronger army and deeper NATO cooperation
summary: Swiss Military Academy survey finds clear majority of Swiss public supports increased defence spending and more formalised cooperation with NATO.

headline: G7 Evian: No-G7 protesters and Geneva authorities at impasse 20 days before summit
summary: Anti-G7 groups announce legal and media campaigns after failing to agree a protest route with Geneva authorities.

headline: Geneva public-sector cartel announces new three-day strike for June 2-4
summary: Geneva's intersyndical cartel announces a new three-day work stoppage to protest against state budget cuts.

headline: US strikes Iranian boats and missile sites as peace-talk progress collapses
summary: US forces struck Iranian naval assets and missile launch positions despite both sides signalling ceasefire progress; Tehran vows response.

headline: EU and European governments summon Russian envoys over threats against Kyiv diplomats
summary: Multiple EU states summoned Russian ambassadors after Moscow threatened foreign diplomats in Kyiv following a major missile barrage.

headline: Israel holds over 1,000 sq km of Gaza, Lebanon and Syria under direct military rule
summary: Al Jazeera analysis finds Israel's territorial footprint across three neighbours exceeds 1000 sq km under direct military control.

headline: India and US sign critical minerals agreement to diversify rare-earth supply chains
summary: India-US bilateral critical minerals deal covering defence, battery and semiconductor manufacturing minerals.

headline: Senegal parliament elects ousted PM Sonko as speaker by overwhelming majority
summary: Ousmane Sonko elected speaker of Senegal's National Assembly after lawmakers reinstated him.

headline: Hajj 2026: over two million pilgrims at Arafat under 44°C heat amid regional wars
summary: Pilgrims gathered at Mount Arafat under near-record heat as conflicts in Gaza and Iran cast a shadow over Hajj.

headline: CVE-2026-7374 (CVSS 9.9): KubeVirt virt-handler symlink attack enables full-node takeover on OpenShift
summary: Critical flaw in KubeVirt's virt-handler allows authenticated namespace-limited OpenShift user to escape to host root via malicious console socket symlink.

headline: CVE-2026-45247 (CVSS 9.8): Mirasvit Magento 2 cache warmer cookie deserialization allows unauthenticated RCE
summary: Unauthenticated attackers can achieve RCE on Magento 2 stores via crafted serialized PHP object in CacheWarmer cookie.

headline: CVE-2026-4480 (CVSS 8.5): Samba printing subsystem passes unescaped client job descriptions to shell print command
summary: Samba's %J substitution in print commands passes client-controlled job descriptions unsanitised to shell, enabling command injection via print jobs.

headline: CVE-2026-40033 (CVSS 8.8): FreeRDP heap buffer overflow in gdi_CacheToSurface enables remote write OOB
summary: FreeRDP before 3.26.0 heap overflow allows malicious RDP server to write out-of-bounds heap memory via unclamped rectangle dimensions.

headline: Check Point Security Gateway: IKE/VPN DoS cluster CVE-2026-48131 and CVE-2026-48132 (CVSS 8.1)
summary: Two Check Point VPN vulnerabilities allow unauthenticated DoS via malformed IKE packets on ports 500 and 4500.

headline: CVE-2026-46368 (CVSS 8.8): OpenWrt luci-app-https-dns-proxy authenticated command injection
summary: Authenticated OpenWrt admin can inject OS commands via setInitAction in luci-app-https-dns-proxy package; PoC published.

headline: arXiv:2605.24042 — Hidden-State Privacy Has an Empty Middle: no Gaussian mechanism achieves both utility and privacy
summary: Proves no single-layer Gaussian hidden-state release simultaneously achieves moderate utility and moderate privacy; introduces split-memory transformer architecture.

headline: arXiv:2605.25114 — Counterfactually Safe Reinforcement Learning: bounding individual harm
summary: Formalizes individual harm from counterfactual perspective, proposes two-stage RL policy learning with provable harm-rate bounds.

headline: arXiv:2605.24749 — How Neural Reward Models Learn Features under RLHF exponential tilting
summary: Analyzes feature learning in neural reward models under exponential policy tilting in RLHF, deriving admissible deployment temperature ranges.

headline: arXiv:2605.24055 — Cascade-KDE: training-free robust time-series restoration under OOD impulse corruptions
summary: Training-free density-truncated restoration framework for industrial sensor time-series, preserving derivative peaks critical for anomaly detection.

headline: arXiv:2605.23978 — Algometrics: deployment risk not identifiable from historical data in algorithmic feedback markets
summary: Proves in algorithmic markets that deployment risk cannot be recovered from passive historical data alone; model rankings can invert under crowding.
